summary: Frontend testing for Trend Syria - Verified car icon (🚗) to motorcycle icon (🏍️) change and notification sound implementation. All 4 delivery component files correctly updated with motorcycle icons. Notification sound system properly implemented in DriverTrackingMap.js with correct React Hooks order.

react_hooks_order.details: All useState hooks (lines 33-38) and useEffect hooks (lines 56, 107) are defined before early returns (lines 114, 124, 135) - compliant with React Hooks rules

driver_dashboard_ui.details: Driver login working with credentials 0900000000/delivery123. Dashboard loads correctly with available orders and my orders tabs.

critical_code_review_comments: All React Hooks properly ordered before conditional returns
Notification sound properly gated with soundPlayed flag to prevent duplicates
Audio error handling implemented with try-catch and .catch() on play()
Distance calculation using Haversine formula is accurate
context_for_next_testing_agent: Car icon to motorcycle icon change completed across all delivery components.
